title: The Wedding Trap Is Set
description: On pages 1–4, this part focuses on Capone Bege, Brook, Big Mom Pirates, Sanji, Jinbe as The wedding ceremony and tea party begin, with Big Mom’s enemies preparing to strike.
scene: The wedding begins under Big Mom’s watch, with hidden assassination plans moving beneath the ceremony.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Mom flies into a seething rage!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: What the hell is going on?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Aren't all the fake straw hats animals?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Okay! Three seconds till she screams!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Holy crap! He peeled the freakin' skin off his face!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Nooo- Oooooo! This is my face!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Yes, I did. A long time ago.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: They've gone whole hog on this!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't believe that they're willing to go to such lengths to save Sanji!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's the second coming of that day! Mama's going to lose it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: That is?! Aaah... and the cake...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is going to be a full-on riot!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: End the straw hats before it all goes south!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island — Tea Party Begins storyline with 35 dialogue beats. The wedding and tea party begin, placing Sanji, Pudding, Big Mom, Bege and the Straw Hats on a collision course.
